class.name: AutoworkHookScript
class.experimental: Some methods may not be implemented and may be changed in future versions.
class.brief_description: Base class for custom test execution hooks.
class.description: The AutoworkHookScript class provides a mechanism to inject custom logic into the test execution process.

method.name: _run
method.description: Virtual method executed when the hook runs.

method.name: abort
method.description: Marks the hook execution as aborted.

method.name: get_exit_code
method.description: Returns the exit code set by the hook.

method.name: set_exit_code
method.description: Sets the exit code for the hook execution.

method.name: should_abort
method.description: Returns whether the hook has been marked for abortion.
